description: WinGet package registry for agentic development across the Level-0, Level-1, and Level-2 repositories.

policy.fallbackSourceRefresh: winget source update when winget update is unavailable

packages.purpose: Source control
GitHub CLI binary; provider sign-in is required only for the direct GitHub profile
GitLab CLI binary; provider sign-in is required only for a GitLab profile
Fast repository search
PowerShell 7 parity scripts
Node.js LTS runtime for npm-based tools and agent CLI packages
Python package/tool runner and Spec Kit installation support
Secret scanning for hooks and manual scans
Memory-safe .NET SDK toolchain
Memory-safe Go toolchain
Python MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories
Java/Javac MSL toolchain for learning-series repositories
Memory-safe Rust toolchain manager
Swift MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories
SBOM generation for supply-chain evidence
Claude Code command-line agent
GitHub Copilot CLI
Google Antigravity command-line agent providing the required agy command
Minimum graphical editor and quasi-IDE for apprentice development
Terminal-native A11Y editor with language-server support
Podman CLI for the required Secure Trader sandbox runtime
PostgreSQL GUI administration when available through WinGet
